name: Dewitt Middle School
description: Come play pickleball at Dewitt Middle School in DeWitt, MI! There are 3 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are free.

name: Fowler High School
description: Come play pickleball at Fowler High School in Fowler, MI! There are 4 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.

name: St. Johns City Park
description: St. Johns City Park is a place to play pickleball in Saint Johns, MI. There are 2 outdoor hard courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. Amenities include restrooms and water. The courts are free.
